title: Start playback from a title detail page
description: This verifies that a user can open a title and start proxy-backed playback from the watch page.

steps.description: Navigate to the homepage
Open a featured title
Start playback
Verify the watch player is displayed
Verify the video stream is loaded

title: Discover a featured title from the homepage
description: This verifies that an Arabic-speaking viewer can open the homepage, find featured content, and reach a title detail page from the hero area.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open a featured title from the homepage hero area
Verify the title detail page is displayed
Verify playback options are available

title: Continue from one episode to another
description: This verifies that a viewer can start an episode from a series and move to a different episode from the watch experience.

steps.description: Navigate to the app homepage
Open a series from featured or browse content
Select a season
Choose an episode from the episode grid
Start playback
Move to another episode from the watch page
Verify the next episode player view is displayed

title: Open a featured title from homepage content tiles
description: This verifies that a viewer can discover a title through homepage featured tiles and open its detail page successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open a featured title from the homepage content tiles
Verify the title detail page is displayed
Verify the selected title is available for playback

title: Open a series and choose an episode
description: This verifies that a viewer can open a series, pick a season, and reach an episode ready for playback.

steps.description: Navigate to the app homepage
Open a series from featured or browse content
Select a season
Choose an episode from the episode grid
Verify the selected episode page is displayed

title: Search and filter for a matching title
description: This verifies that a user can search for a title, refine results with filters, and open the matching result.

steps.description: Navigate to the search page
Fill in the search field with a specific title
Select a genre filter
Select a year filter
Select a rating filter
Select a type filter
Verify the matching search result is displayed
Open the matching result
Verify the title details are displayed

title: Search for a title and open the matching result
description: This verifies that a viewer can search for a specific title, see matching results, and open the correct title detail page.

steps.description: Navigate to /search
Enter a title or keyword into the search field
Submit the search
Open the matching result
Verify the title detail page is displayed
Verify the matching result remains available in the search results

title: Use the app comfortably on mobile
description: This verifies that a mobile user can browse in the responsive layout, search for a title, open a result, and reach playback.

steps.description: Navigate to the app homepage
Verify the responsive mobile layout is displayed
Open the search page
Search for a title
Open a matching result
Start playback
Verify the player is displayed and ready for watching

title: Browse movies archive with pagination and sorting
description: This verifies that a user can browse the movies archive, move through pages, change sort order, and open a movie detail page.

steps.description: Navigate to the movies archive page
Scroll to the movie grid
Move to another page of movie results
Change the sort order
Open a movie
Verify the movie details are displayed
Verify the archive browsing controls remain available

title: Browse series archive and open a series
description: This verifies that a user can browse the series archive, view recent episodes, and open a series detail page with its episode list.

steps.description: Navigate to the series archive page
Scroll to the series grid
View the latest episodes listing
Open a series
Verify the series details are displayed
Verify the episode list is displayed

title: Browse a category grid from the homepage
description: This verifies that a viewer can select a content category on the homepage and browse the matching title grid.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Select a content category from the homepage
Verify a matching grid of titles is displayed
Verify a title detail entry point is available from the results

title: Watch a title with selected quality and subtitles
description: This verifies that a user can choose a playback quality and subtitle track while watching a title.

steps.description: Navigate to a title detail page with playback available
Start playback
Select a video quality
Select a subtitle track
Verify the selected quality is active
Verify subtitles are available during playback

title: Browse the interface in Arabic RTL on desktop
description: This verifies that an Arabic-speaking viewer sees the app in a usable right-to-left layout while browsing content and opening a title.

steps.description: Navigate to the app homepage
Verify the interface is displayed in right-to-left layout
Open a title from featured or category content
Verify the title detail page is displayed

title: Play an episode and continue to the next one
description: This verifies that a viewer can start an episode, skip the intro, and continue to the next episode from the player.

steps.description: Navigate to a series detail page with multiple episodes
Open an episode
Start playback
Skip the intro when it appears
Continue to the next episode
Verify the next episode player is displayed
Verify playback continues in the new episode

title: Open a title from category browsing results
description: This verifies that a viewer can browse a category and open one of the matching titles to reach its detail page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Select a content category from the homepage
Open a title from the category results
Verify the title detail page is displayed

title: Refine search results with genre and type filters
description: This verifies that a viewer can narrow search results using genre and type filters and see the filtered list update accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /search
Enter a title or keyword into the search field
Apply a genre filter
Apply a type filter
Verify the filtered results are displayed
Verify only matching content types are shown

title: Browse catalog in Arabic on mobile
description: This verifies that a mobile Arabic-speaking viewer can navigate the catalog without layout issues in the responsive RTL interface.

steps.description: Navigate to the app homepage
Verify the interface is displayed in right-to-left layout
Verify the responsive mobile layout is displayed
Open a title from browse content
Verify the title detail page is displayed

title: Refine search results with year and rating filters
description: This verifies that a viewer can narrow search results by year and rating and see results that match the selected constraints.

steps.description: Navigate to /search
Enter a title or keyword into the search field
Apply a year filter
Apply a rating filter
Verify the filtered results are displayed
Verify the results match the selected constraints

title: Switch playback source during watching
description: This verifies that a user can open a title with multiple sources and switch to another source without leaving the watch page.

steps.description: Navigate to a title detail page with multiple sources
Start playback
Switch to another source
Verify the selected source changes
Verify playback remains active

title: Use picture-in-picture and return to the player on mobile
description: This verifies that a mobile user can enter picture-in-picture mode during playback and return to the main player afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to a title detail page on a mobile viewport
Start playback
Enable picture-in-picture mode
Verify the floating player is displayed
Return to the main player
Verify the main player is displayed

title: Show an empty state for a search with no matches
description: This verifies that a viewer gets a clear empty state when a search term produces no matching titles.

steps.description: Navigate to /search
Enter a unique search term with no expected matches into the search field
Submit the search
Verify an empty state message is visible
Verify no search results are displayed

title: Show an empty state for a search with no results
description: This verifies that an empty state is shown when a user searches for a title that returns no matches after filters are applied.

steps.description: Navigate to the search page
Fill in the search field with a rare title
Select filters that narrow the results
Verify an empty state message is visible
